no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested spec ratification touches a much larger surface than the scoped FEAT/ADR/test-plan docs: the exact search query still matches active docs, duplicated skill copies under both .claude/skills and .agents/skills, and generated command pages that would need a coordinated doc-sweep to make acceptance #8 truthful. This attempt cannot safely complete that breadth of edits within the depth cap of 3 without leaving the contract partially updated.
